examples: The room was decorated with twee little pictures of animals.
His nest was in the apple tree, tweet, tweet, twee!
Twee though it may be, the word is an apt description the entire Arsenal defence this season.
His first two records were mostly acoustic, twee folk pop with a liberal sprinkling of strings.
King of Prussia is a 5-piece group that dispenses twee-pop with sweet harmonies, ringing guitars and infectious melodies.
